content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 4.5.1–4.5.3 WARN — Push entitlement present (App/DealAlerts.entitlements:3) and NotificationScheduler.swift:9-12 schedules repeating hourly promotional notifications ("hourly-deals", repeats every 3600s), matching description.txt's "alert you EVERY HOUR ... unlimited notifications" marketing claim, with no visible opt-in consent UI or per-alert user control shown in the code.
Pierre: Apple explicitly flags exactly this pattern under 4.5.3/4.5.4 — using push for recurring marketing spam rather than user-initiated, discrete alerts, which risks losing push privileges. You should implement per-deal opt-in (not a blanket "every hour" toggle), let users control frequency/categories, and reword the marketing copy to avoid promising spam-like unlimited hourly pushes. Verify there's an explicit consent screen and an in-app opt-out before shipping.
